news.summary: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has released its financial results for the third quarter of the 2025 fiscal year, ending on April 30, 2025 (referred to as “FQ3 2025”). The key highlights include net sales of $3,577,113 during FQ3 2025, showing a 25.24% increase from the previous period. All the figures mentioned are in Canadian Dollars.
news.headline: Cizzle Brands' Q3 2025 results show net sales of $3,577,113, with a growth rate of over 25% for the quarter.

news.summary: A report titled "How Mobile POS is Reshaping Retail Journeys - mPOS Market Study - 2025" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report focuses on the Mobile POS (mPOS) Market in North America. Over the past three years, a total of X devices were shipped within this market. Currently, there are X devices installed, with a forecast predicting the shipment of Y new devices in the upcoming years. Although the report does not provide market share details by vendor, it does offer information on the variety of devices available in the market.
news.headline: Report examines mPOS Market in North America, details past shipments, current installations & future forecasts.

news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on June 13, 2025, Shenzhen EngineAI Robotics, a pioneer in humanoid robots, launched a set of open-source tools for developers. The resources cover various aspects of robotics, including modular architecture design, and aim to offer structured support. This suite of resources is expected to boost innovation in robotics and enhance the development process.
news.headline: Shenzhen EngineAI Robotics releases open-source resources to support robotics development, aiding developers with structured guidance.

news.summary: The 2025 Annual Meeting of the International Society for Stem Cell Research (ISSCR) is hailed as the premier event for global leaders in stem cell and regenerative medicine. With a significant number of attendees and thought leaders from around the world, the conference serves as a pivotal gathering for advancing research and collaboration in the field.
news.headline: BioRestorative presents promising results for fast-tracked BRTX-100 in treating Lumbar Disc Disease at ISSCR 2025 conference.

news.summary: In Los Angeles on June 13, 2025, Exhale Wellness, a prominent player in the hemp-derived wellness sector in the U.S., unveiled its much-awaited THCa flower varieties for the year. The collection features notable options such as Purple Gelato and Lemon Cherry Gelato, which have quickly gained...
news.headline: Exhale Wellness introduces its 2025 THCa flower lineup featuring Purple Gelato and Lemon Cherry Gelato.

news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia, on June 13, 2025, an important development was announced. On May 7, 2025, the FDA granted approval for an Investigational New Drug (IND) application, allowing Myrio's primary product, PHOX2B PC-CAR T, to proceed to human trials. Myrio has partnered with the prominent children's hospital in Philadelphia for the development of this Chimeric Antigen Receptor technology.
news.headline: FDA approves IND application for Myrio's lead product (PHOX2B PC-CAR T) in neuroblastoma treatment on 13th June, 2025.

news.summary: In MIDLAND, Texas, AST SpaceMobile, Inc. shared that they, listed as ASTS on NASDAQ, revealed a Settlement Term Sheet involving them, Ligado Networks LLC, Viasat, Inc., and Inmarsat Global Limited. This breakthrough paves the way for the approval of final documents related to the creation of the first space-based cellular broadband network. This network is unique as it can be accessed directly via regular smartphones, catering to commercial and government uses.
news.headline: AST SpaceMobile settles for access to 45 MHz spectrum in North America for direct-to-device satellite apps.

news.summary: Buffalo, NY - On June 13, 2025, ALL4 Mining, a cloud mining platform established in 2019, disclosed its plans for a global expansion of mining services with the objective of democratizing cryptocurrency investment for both new and seasoned investors. The company, with a current user base exceeding 9 million spanning over 200 countries, offers mining packages ranging from $15 to $300,000. ALL4 Mining enables users to rent computing power and generate returns from cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin. By operating through their secure infrastructure, ALL4 Mining eliminates the need for users to handle physical hardware, energy expenses, or system maintenance. An ALL4 Mining representative expressed, "Our aim is to streamline financial inclusion by simplifying crypto mining processes and eliminating technical...". For the full article, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: ALL4 Mining expands to offer user-friendly cloud mining for cryptocurrency with 9 million users in 200 countries. Packages range from $15 to $300,000.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, reAlpha Tech Corp. (Nasdaq: AIRE) disclosed its plans to extend its AI-driven real estate technology services to Texas, beginning with the introduction of real estate broker services in Texas 1. This move signifies the Company's progression beyond Florida into other states, commencing with the vibrant real estate sector in Texas. This expansion showcases reAlpha's commitment to providing a comprehensive homebuying journey beyond its initial market presence.
news.headline: reAlpha Tech Corp. (Nasdaq: AIRE) expands into Texas, launching real estate services, marking the first step in a national expansion.

news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on June 13, 2025, Altimmune, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALT), a biopharmaceutical company in late clinical stages, revealed plans for presentations at the American Diabetes Association’s 85th Scientific Sessions in Chicago, IL from June 20-23, 2025. The company will feature an oral presentation and three poster presentations focusing on pemvidutide, a promising GLP-1/glucagon dual receptor agonist. Pemvidutide is currently being developed for various conditions including metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), obesity, alcohol use disorder (AUD), and alcohol-associated liver disease (ALD).
news.headline: Altimmune to present at ADA Scientific Sessions in Chicago on June 20-23, 2025 with an oral presentation and three posters on pemvidutide, a GLP-1/glucagon dual receptor agonist for MASH, obesity, AUD, and ALD.

news.summary: Atlanta, June 13, 2025 - Chart Industries, Inc. (NYSE: GTLS), a prominent provider of energy and industrial gas solutions worldwide, is set to take part in the J.P. Morgan Energy, Power, Renewables, and Mining Conference in New York. The company's President and CEO, Jill Evanko, will engage in a fireside discussion on Tuesday, June 24th. A webcast of the event will be broadcasted at 10:55 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.headline: Chart Industries (NYSE: GTLS) to present at J.P. Morgan Energy, Power, Renewables & Mining Conference in NY on June 24. CEO Jill Evanko to participate. Webcast at 10:55 a.m. ET.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, in Vancouver, BC, New Wave Holdings Corp. disclosed a strategic investment of US$150,000 into Cartwheel Robotics Inc. This investment marks a significant move for New Wave, listed as CSE:NWAI, FWB:0XM0, and OTCPK:TRMNF.
news.headline: New Wave invests $150,000 in Cartwheel Robotics, an advanced robotics company aiming to build humanoids for humans.

news.summary: In Cincinnati on June 13, 2025, Phillips Edison & Company, Inc. (Nasdaq: PECO) disclosed the pricing of a public offering by its operating partnership, Phillips Edison Grocery Center Operating Partnership I, L.P., of $350 million in 5.250% senior unsecured notes due 2032. The Notes were priced at 99.832% of the principal amount and have a maturity date of August 15, 2032. The settlement for this offering is expected on June 17, 2025, pending customary closing conditions. It is important to note that the notes will benefit from full and unconditional guarantees by PECO.
news.headline: Phillips Edison & Company prices a $350 million offering of 5.250% senior unsecured notes due 2032, priced at 99.832%.
